rulings.Case Title: HANS REINHARDT VS. PRANA EIGHT PROPERTIES LLC et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 16, 2013, line 1 - DEFENDANT PARAMOUNT HOTEL INC., IGOR SPITALNIKOV and JORDAN BUCKLEY's DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendant Paramount Hotel's Demurrer to Second Amended Complaint is sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer is sustained without leave to amend as to 3rd cause of action. Demurrer is overruled as to 1st, 2nd, 4th, and 5th causes of action. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: HANS REINHARDT VS. PRANA EIGHT PROPERTIES LLC et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 16, 2013, line 1 - DEFENDANT PRANA EIGHT PROPERTIES LLC's DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendant Prana Eight Properties, Spitalnikov and Buckley's Demurrer to Second Amended Complaint is sustained in part and overrule in part. Demurer to causes of action 1, 2 and 4 is sustained with leave to amend as to Prana to allege terms of employment contract/relationship with Prana; Demurrer to causes of action 1, 2 and 4 is sustained without leave to amend as to Spitalnikov and Buckley. Plaintiff cites no authority for the proposition that co-employees are liable for wrongful termination. Sustain without leave to amend as to cause of action 3 for defamation as to all moving defendants. Overrule as to the 5th cause of action for wrongful eviction as to all moving defendants. = (501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: HANS REINHARDT VS. PRANA EIGHT PROPERTIES LLC et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 16, 2013, line 1 - DEFENDANT PRANA EIGHT PROPERTIES LLC's DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendant Prana Eight Properties' Demurrer to Second Amended Complaint is OFF CALENDAR, duplicate. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: BOARD OF TRUSTEES OF THE CALIFORNIA STATE VS. JUNE JULSON
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 16, 2013, line 2 - DEFENDANT JUNE JULSON' DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendant's Demurrer to First Amended Compliant is OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Plaintiff sufficiently alleges exemption from SFRO. Defendant's counsel is ordered to comply with SFRO 2.6C in future. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: MARIA I. GUATEMALA VS. VICENTE DE ALMEIDA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 16, 2013, line 3 - DEFENDANT VICENTE DE ALMEIDA's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND. Defendant's Motion to Set Aside Default GRANTED. Proof of Service of First Amended Complaint is executed by non-registered process server. Defendant shall file his answer no later than April 16, 2013 by 4:00 p.m. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: JOSEPH HARNEY VS. JOSEPH MANDELLA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Order Compelling Further Responses To Form Interrogatories , Set One And For Monetary And Evidence Santions
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 16, 2013, line 4 - DEFENDANT JOSEPH MANDELLA's Motion For Order Compelling Further Responses To Form Interrogatories , Set One And For Monetary And Evidence Santions. Defendant's Motion to Compel Further Responses to Form Interrogatories. Parties are ordered to appear at 9:00 a.m. to engage in meaningful "meet and confer" efforts. Parties shall report their progress at 9:30 a.m. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: GLENDA GUTIERREZ VS. LIGIA DE LEON FLORES
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 16, 2013, line 5 - DEFENDANT LIGIA DE LEON FLORES' MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Defendant's Motion for Summary Judgment is OFF CALENDAR. Dismissal field April 15, 2013. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: QUINCY YU et al VS. JEFFREY YU et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn By Pltff To Compel Def To Respond To Written Discovery And Produce Docs And Appear For Oral Deposition
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 16, 2013, line 6 - PLAINTIFF QUINCY YU, KAY YU Motion To Compel Defendant To Respond To Written Discovery And Produce Docs And Appear For Oral Deposition. Plaintiff's Motion to Compel Responses is GRANTED as to Motion to Compel Deposition. Hearing required to address sufficiency of responses to Written Discovery. Grant sanction to moving party in the amount of $1,410. Opposing party is odered to comply with CRC 3.1113(f). =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: LIDIA AVILA VS. JOEL CABALLERO et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 16, 2013, line 7 - DEFENDANT JOEL CABALLERO's MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT. Defendant Joel Caballero's Motion to Set Aside Default is GRANTED. Proof of Service of Summons and Complaint executed by non-registered process server. Defendant shall file his answer no later than 4 p.m. April 16, 2013. =(501/AJR)

rulings.Case Title: SWORDS TO PLOWSHARES VS. KOENIG, GEORGE, A.K.A. GEORGE KOENING et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, April 16, 2013, line 8 - DEFENDANT GEORGE KOENIG's MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT. Defendant's Motion to Set Aside Default.
